surface: va neu hii du cen rel sha pul meda hiq
gloss: Neutral, high-vividness, medium-bright central red sharp pulsing visual state; medium stability; high certainty.

surface: va neu mii un difa blu haz wav low meq
gloss: Neutral, medium-vividness, dim diffuse blue haze wave-like visual state; low stability; medium certainty.

surface: va mix hii tri allo wha clr fli low hiq
gloss: Mixed-valence, high-vividness, bright field-wide white clear flickering visual state; low stability; high certainty.

surface: va neg mii du per blk smr osc meda meq
gloss: Negative, medium-vividness, medium-bright peripheral black smear oscillating visual state; medium stability; medium certainty.
